title: Helm Chart — Production-Ready K8s Deployment with Security Hardening
description: test_helm_chart.py validates chart structure, template YAML, and file existence. The chart is the only member of this community, indicating it is isolated from the main application code. Gap: the Helm chart exists structurally but lacks production security hardening — no NetworkPolicy, PodSecurityPolicy/PSA, non-root user enforcement, or resource limits are defined.
missing: Pod Security Admission: add securityContext with runAsNonRoot=true, readOnlyRootFilesystem=true, and drop ALL capabilities to all containers
NetworkPolicy: restrict ingress to only the API gateway and egress to configured external services (S3, SIEM, notification endpoints)
Resource limits: define CPU/memory requests and limits for all containers with HPA configured for API pods based on CPU utilization
